purpose: Normalized current-content extracts captured by Codex web tooling when a source blocks the local HTTP client. These extracts can verify current candidate content, but they are not cutoff-valid archive proof.

overrides.title: Qualifying Classification | Federation Internationale de l'Automobile
overrides.notes: Current official FIA page text included classification and official grid rows; this is only current-content support and still requires cutoff archive proof before formal replay use.
overrides.content_text: Qualifying Classification. CLASSIFICATION. GRID OFFICIAL. POS DRIVER TEAM TIME. 1 Andrea Kimi Antonelli Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS Forumla One Team 1:27.798. 2 Max Verstappen Oracle Red Bull Racing 1:27.964. 3 Charles Leclerc Scuderia Ferrari HP 1:28.143. 4 Lando Norris McLaren Mastercard F1 Team 1:28.183. 5 George Russell Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS Forumla One Team 1:28.197. 6 Lewis Hamilton Scuderia Ferrari HP 1:28.319.
